summary: Package fetches and executes payload from anonymous Cloudflare R2 bucket
details: dist/bootstrap.js contains hardcoded references to an anonymous Cloudflare R2 bucket (https://pub-046c52795b9445cd9f5cc5cb21b9d59f.r2.dev) and uses fetch() in conjunction with process.env reads. Anonymous R2 buckets (pub-*.r2.dev) are documented payload-distribution infrastructure; the bucket contents are mutable and the host has no relationship to the package's stated purpose (an MCP server for ANVISA's drug bulario). The structural pattern — hardcoded fetch to an anonymous file-host bucket combined with environment-variable access — matches the @chahuadev/* dropper cluster fingerprint. There is no legitimate reason for an MCP server library to fetch executable content from a randomly-named R2 bucket at bootstrap time.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
